common.subject: Subject
common.name: Name
common.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to perform this action.
common.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
common.profileNotFound: No school profile found for this account. Ask your administrator to add you.
common.profileMissingRole: Your account is not configured correctly. Contact your school administrator.
common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.slide1Desc: Your school hub for attendance, homework, exams, and progress — all in one place.
onboarding.slide2Desc: View assignments, exam schedules, report cards, remarks, and stay updated with announcements.
onboarding.slide3Desc: Manage classes, record attendance, publish homework, grade exams, and communicate with families.
onboarding.slide4Desc: Sign in with the credentials provided by your school administrator to get started.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use the email and password provided by your school
login.resetHint: Enter your school email and we will send a reset link.
login.changeSchoolMsg: Return to the school list and pick a different school?
login.schoolNotReady: School connection is not ready. Please select your school again.
login.enterEmailPassword: Please enter your email and password.
login.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
login.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.
login.loginFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
login.invalidEmailAuth: The email address is badly formatted.
login.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
login.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again later.
login.resetSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
login.resetFailed: Could not send reset email. Please try again.
login.notRegisteredHint: Not registered? Please ask your school administrator for login credentials.

changePassword.title: Set your password
changePassword.subtitle: Your school gave you a temporary password. Choose a new password before continuing.
changePassword.hint: Do not reuse the default temporary password (e.g. 123456).
changePassword.fillAll: Enter your temporary password and a new password.
changePassword.blockedDefault: Choose a stronger password than the default temporary one.
changePassword.logoutMsg: You must change your password to use the app. Sign out if you need help from your school.

selectSchool.title: Choose your school
selectSchool.subtitle: Select the school registered by your administrator. You will sign in to that school's account database next.
selectSchool.empty: No schools are available yet. Contact your administrator.
selectSchool.connectError: Could not connect to this school

profile.changeEmailHint: Enter a new email and your current password to update your login address.
profile.changePasswordHint: Use a strong password with at least 6 characters.
profile.forgotHint: Forgot your password? Use “Forgot password?” on the sign-in screen.
profile.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.savedEmail: Your login email has been changed. Use the new address next time you sign in.
profile.removePhotoConfirm: Your profile picture will be removed.
profile.photoPermissionDenied: Photo library access is required to choose a profile picture.
profile.photoTooLarge: Image must be smaller than 5 MB.
profile.photoStorageNotReady: School storage is not connected. Sign out, select your school again, and retry.
profile.photoReadFailed: Could not read the selected image. Try another photo.
profile.photoStorageRules: Upload blocked by Firebase Storage rules. Deploy storage.rules to your school project (see docs/DEPLOYMENT.md).
profile.photoFirestoreRules: Profile saved to storage but Firestore blocked photoURL. Deploy firestore.rules to your school project.
profile.photoStorageUnavailable: Firebase Storage is unavailable. Check that Storage is enabled and storageBucket is set for this school.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyTeacher: No notifications yet. Updates about attendance, absences, and school news will appear here.
notifications.emptyStudent: No notifications yet. Homework, exams, and school announcements will appear here.
notifications.emptyParent: No notifications yet. Alerts about your children's attendance and school updates will appear here.
notifications.emptyAdmin: No notifications yet. Usage-time alerts and school updates will appear here.

dashboard.examGradesSub: Grade exams and open student report cards
dashboard.absenceReportsSub: Review proactive parent reports and replies to marked absences
dashboard.tapClassHint: Tap a class to view students and quick actions
dashboard.selectClassHint: Select a class to list students

academic.noClassesAssigned: No classes assigned to you. Ask an admin to assign you to a class and subject on the Assignments screen.
academic.noSubjectsWarn: No subjects assigned for this class. Ask your admin to assign you to a subject (Assignments → teacher to subject).
academic.noSubjectsWarnShort: No subjects assigned for this class. Ask your admin to assign you to a subject first.
academic.remarkClassHint: Class is selected above. Pick a student, type, and remark below.
academic.noStudentsInClass: No students in this class yet.
academic.ratingHint: A 1–5 star score for this remark. Students see it as stars on the remark detail screen. Leave blank if not needed.

alerts.subjectRequiredMsg: Select a subject you are assigned to teach.

absenceReports.intro: Absence reports submitted by parents for your students.
absenceReports.emptyText: When parents report an absence, it will appear here.

examReports.pageSub: Grade exams per student and view the same report parents see (scores + parent viewed status).
examReports.noClassesSub: Ask admin to assign you to a class, then return here.
examReports.noExamsSub: Create exams in Academic → Exams, then grade students here.
examReports.loadExamsError: Could not load exams for this class.
examReports.loadStudentsError: Could not load students for this class.
examReports.loadIssueHint: {{error}} Deploy latest firestore.rules if this persists.
examReports.reportRowSub: Same view parents see — all exams & overall grades
examReports.certificateNeedsGradeHint: Save a score for this student before exporting the term exam certificate.
examReports.exportAllCertificatesNoneHint: Grade at least one student for this exam before exporting certificates.

homework.title: Create Homework
homework.noClassesAssigned: No classes assigned to this teacher

grades.title: Record Student Grades
grades.selectClassHint: Select a class on the Grades tab or ask admin to assign you
grades.invalidScore: Score must be a number between 0 and 100

studentReport.title: Student report
studentReport.loadError: Could not load report. Check class access and try again.

reportCard.emptyAttendance: No attendance records for this student yet.
reportCard.emptyExams: No exams recorded for this class yet.
reportCard.emptySubjects: Subject averages appear here once exams are graded for this student.

certificates.adminSubtitle: Export yearly subject result certificates for a class
certificates.adminHint: Builds one PDF with a certificate page per student. Includes all graded term exams in the selected academic year, grouped by subject.
certificates.termExamCertifies: This certifies the term examination result for
certificates.selectClassHint: Choose a class before exporting certificates.
certificates.noClasses: Create a class and grade exams before exporting certificates.
certificates.noData: No graded exam results found for this class and academic year.
certificates.noSubjectResults: No graded results for this academic year.
certificates.shareUnavailable: PDF sharing is not available on this device.
certificates.exportFailed: Could not export the certificate PDF.

parent.dashboardSubtitle: Select a child to view their progress and school updates
parent.partialLoadWarning: {{count}} linked child profile(s) could not be loaded. Ask your school admin to re-link parent–student assignments.
parent.reportAbsenceSubtitle: Notify the school when your child will be absent
parent.respondAttendanceSubtitle: Confirm or explain your child's absence

dashboard.scheduleEmptyToday: You're done for today — no more periods on your schedule.
dashboard.scheduleNoClass: No class linked yet — schedule will appear when your class is set.
dashboard.homeworkNothingAssigned: Nothing assigned yet. Check back later.
dashboard.homeworkNoActive: No active homework — past due items are hidden.
dashboard.examsNoneScheduled: No exams scheduled for your class yet.
dashboard.examsAllCaughtUp: Past exams are hidden — you're all caught up.

admin.dashboardSubtitle: Manage your school from one place
admin.myProfileDesc: Update email, password, and sign out
admin.assignmentsDesc: Link users to classes and families
admin.directoriesHint: Manage accounts when someone leaves, moves, or needs a password reset.
admin.usageExpiredNotice: Subscription time has expired. Recharge fee-time now.
admin.usageRechargeHint: Please contact platform administrator to recharge this school.
admin.usersHint: To edit emails, reset passwords, or remove users, use the directory buttons on the admin home screen (Students, Teachers, Parents).
admin.assignmentsSubtitle: Classes, subjects, teachers, students, and parents
admin.parentLinkHint: You can link the same parent to multiple students — each link is kept separately.
admin.classSyncDesc: Sync student profiles with latest academic assignments.
admin.studentDirSubtitle: Update details, reset passwords, or remove leavers
admin.teacherDirSubtitle: Staff who left, email changes, password resets
admin.parentDirSubtitle: Families who moved out or need account updates
admin.noChartData: No chart data yet. Add users and classes.
admin.gradeAverageSample: Grade average from a sample of {{count}} scores
admin.legacyCollectionsNote: Includes class subcollections and legacy root collections
admin.timetableNoticeText: Periods are no longer saved to the top-level timetables collection. Use Classes → Class schedule. Firestore path: classes/{{classId}}/schedules/{{docId}}
admin.classAndMessageRequired: Class ID and message are required
admin.classHomeworkRequired: Class ID, homework title, and due date are required
admin.classExamRequired: Class ID, subject, and date are required
admin.classRemarkRequired: Class ID and remark are required
admin.deleteClassMessage: Delete "{{name}}"? Student and teacher links for this class will be removed. Class data (homework, exams) may remain in storage.
admin.noEmailOnFile: This user has no email on file.
admin.resetPasswordMessage: Send a password reset link to {{email}}?
admin.resetPasswordHint: The user can set a new password from the link in their inbox.
admin.passwordResetNote: Password reset sends an email link. Login email in Firebase may still match the original address until reset is completed.
admin.removeUserMessage: Remove {{name}}? Their assignments and links will be cleared. They will no longer appear in the app.
admin.broadcastNoClasses: Create at least one class before broadcasting.
admin.broadcastConfirmMessage: This announcement will be posted to all {{count}} class(es). Students see announcements for their assigned class.
admin.broadcastHint: Sends the same announcement to every class ({{count}} total). Each class gets its own copy under classes/{classId}/announcements.
admin.excelConfirmWorkbook: Import all recognized sheets in order (classes → users → assignments → academic data)?
admin.excelHint: Use one .xlsx workbook with named sheets, or a single sheet for one data type. First row must be column headers. Import classes and users before assignments and academic data.
admin.noImportableRows: File opened but no importable rows were detected. Check sheet tab names and column headers, or use the template.
admin.subjectAlreadyInList: This subject is already in the list.
admin.classSubjectsHint: Each class offers subjects such as Math, English, Quran, Geography. Tap Add to save each subject to the class, then assign teachers below.
admin.noSubjectsForClass: No subjects yet for this class.
admin.fillTimeAndSubject: Fill in time range and subject
admin.scheduleVisibleToday: Students see this on their dashboard today.
admin.scheduleVisibleOtherDay: Students only see this on {{day}}. Today is {{today}} — switch the Day chip to add today's schedule.
admin.classScheduleHint: Saved under Firestore: classes → (pick class) → schedules → (auto id). Not the old top-level timetables collection.
admin.todayIsBanner: Today is {{day}} — select that day so students see periods on their dashboard now.
admin.noPeriodsForDay: No periods for this day yet.
admin.teacherSubjectHint: A teacher must be assigned to at least one class and one subject (e.g. 5A → Math). They can teach multiple subjects and classes.
admin.addSubjectsFirst: Add subjects to this class in the section above first.
admin.tempPasswordHint: New users sign in with this temporary password and must choose their own password on first login.
admin.workbookSheetsList: Sheets: classes, users, student_class, teacher_class, parent_student, homework, exams, remarks, announcements

superAdmin.loginSubtitle: Manage schools on the EduTrack platform
superAdmin.setupReminderText: Create the super admin in your registry Firebase project: Auth user plus users/{{uid}} with role superAdmin.
superAdmin.schoolsSubtitle: Manage schools, subscriptions, and billable user counts
superAdmin.schoolsEmptyHint: Add a school with its Firebase project credentials so users can select it before signing in.
superAdmin.deleteSchoolMessage: Remove "{{name}}" from the registry? This does not delete the school's Firebase project.
superAdmin.schoolFormSubtitle: Firebase web app config for this school project
superAdmin.activeInPickerHint: Hidden schools stay in the registry but users cannot select them.
superAdmin.firebaseConfigHint: Copy from Firebase Console → Project settings → Your apps → Web app. Each school must use its own Firebase project.
superAdmin.usageExpiresAtHint: Set when this school subscription/usage period ends.
superAdmin.userCountHint: Used for platform billing. Leave empty if unknown.
superAdmin.userCountInvalid: Billable user count must be a whole number 0 or greater.
superAdmin.billingHint: Billable users are set on the school form. Subscription expiry is edited there too.
superAdmin.syncUserCountsFailed: Could not sync user counts. Deploy registry Cloud Functions first.
superAdmin.syncPartialMessage: {{synced}} schools synced, {{failed}} failed. Check IAM access on school projects.
superAdmin.schoolLogoUrlHint: Paste an HTTPS image URL (you can use Firebase Storage or Cloudinary).
